text:
Rapper Snoop Dogg will work as a correspondent for NBC during the Olympic Games in 2024. The entertainer will attend the competition in Paris, where he will meet with the athletes and their families.

In an interview with NBC Snoop Dogg said:

It is noted that the rapper's reports from the French capital will be broadcast in prime time.

The Olympic Games will be held in Paris from July 26 to August 11, 2024. Earlier it became known that Ukraine may face sanctions in case they boycott the Olympics in Paris due to a possible admission of Russia.

title: Snoop Dogg Will Work At Paris Olympics
description: Rapper Snoop Dogg will work as a correspondent for NBC during the Olympic Games in 2024. The entertainer will attend the competition in Paris, where he will meet with the athletes and their families.
